subject: SUPPLEMENT: complete infrastructure inventory for mesh-core extraction

content.summary: Complete inventory of everything ops-session built that needs extraction into mesh-core. Includes integrations, scripts, hooks, and Python modules not covered in the initial proposal.

core_infra.db/: SQLite access — QueryJSON, QueryScalar, Exec, SanitizeID. Zero CGO (shells out to sqlite3 -json).
core_infra.events/: Dispatcher (TRN analog), Gc handler (basal ganglia), hippocampal replay, gc_learning, gc_event_counters. Persistent counters in state.db.
core_infra.spawner/: Claude deliberation lifecycle. Circuit breaker (3 fails → 5min cooldown). Mesh-wide N-slot filesystem lock (coded, not wired — ZMQ consensus proposed). deliberate.sh wrapper.
core_infra.transport/: Cross-repo fetcher via git show (replaced GitHub API). Convention A only (from-{peer} files). Auto-adds git remotes.
core_infra.server/: HTTP server, 30+ routes, CORS, CSP, static embedding, SSE/WS, agent identity patching. Houses LCARS dashboard, all API handlers, agentd stubs.
core_infra.config/: .dev.vars loader, cogarch.config.json parser, CLI flag handling. SessionDetectDir for active session detection via JSONL mtime.
core_infra.budget/: Budget gate. Dual-schema compat removed (all migrated). sleep_mode controls.
core_infra.oscillator/: Self-oscillation event loop. 6 signals, weighted activation, refractory, fire history. Heartbeat emission (mesh-state files). OnFire callback → dispatcher.
core_infra.tempo/: Cognitive tempo v2 — meshd-native metrics. Gc/Gf ratio, backlog pressure, gain computation. Tier selection (haiku/sonnet/opus).

integrations.notify/: Pluggable notifications — NullNotifier, FileNotifier, MacOSNotifier (osascript), ZulipNotifier (HTTP API — blocked by CF challenge on kashifshah.net), WebhookNotifier, FanoutNotifier (comma-separated channels). NOTIFY_CHANNEL=macos,zulip.
integrations.kvstore/: Cloudflare KV self-observation — writes agent status to CF KV for compositor fallback. Requires CF_ACCOUNT_ID + KV_NAMESPACE_ID + CF_API_TOKEN.
integrations.webhook/: GitHub webhook receiver — HMAC-SHA256 verification. Handles push events → transport watcher.
integrations.zmqbus/: ZMQ PUB/SUB mesh bus. Star topology. Gossip discovery. Topic-based routing. Currently used for status broadcast, alert relay.
integrations.monitor/: CI failure monitor — watches GitHub Actions (now removed) or Jenkins for build failures.
integrations.exosome/: Generic dual-write transport unit — routing, delivery, trajectory audit. 9 tests.

python_modules.scripts/dual_write.py: CLI dispatcher for state layer — 10 subcommands (transport-message, mark-processed, gate-open, trigger-activation, lesson, etc.). Routes to scripts/state/ domain modules.
python_modules.scripts/state/: DDD bounded contexts — transport.py, gates.py, knowledge.py, cogarch.py, quality.py, predictions.py, events.py, connection.py. All write to state.db.
python_modules.scripts/compute-psychometrics.py: PAD + NASA-TLX computation from operational metrics. Reads state.db, writes /tmp/{agent}-psychometrics.json. Being replaced by Go-native computeTier().
python_modules.scripts/cognitive-tempo.py: Original tempo model. Superseded by Go-native tempo.go.
python_modules.scripts/oscillator-shadow.py: Shadow mode analysis. Superseded by Go-native oscillator.
python_modules.note: Phase 7 requires replacing all Python with Go. dual_write.py + scripts/state/ represent the biggest migration target.

hooks..claude/hooks/_debug.sh: Shared helper — resolves AGENT_ID + PROJECT_ROOT for all hooks.
hooks..claude/hooks/gwt-broadcast.sh: GWT broadcast → trigger_activations recording. PostToolUse hook.
hooks..claude/hooks/eprime-enforcer.sh: E-Prime detector — warns on 'to be' forms in *.md. Logs to eprime-violations.jsonl.
Validates transport message JSON against interagent/v1 schema.
hooks..claude/hooks/prediction-detector.sh: Detects predictions in Claude output for the prediction ledger.
hooks..claude/hooks/manifest-regenerate.sh: Auto-regenerates MANIFEST.json when transport files change.

scripts_fleet.scripts/meshctl: Fleet control CLI — wake/sleep/slots/budget/drain/pulse/status. Reads/writes state.db + queries meshd HTTP.
scripts_fleet.scripts/deliberate.sh: Pluggable LLM wrapper — resolves claude via PATH, ~/.claude/local, nvm. DELIBERATION_BACKEND env for future backends.
scripts_fleet.scripts/autonomous-sync.sh: Legacy sync runner — being replaced by agentd. Budget source-of-truth, schema migrations, heartbeat emission.
scripts_fleet.scripts/validate-deploy.sh: Post-deploy health check — all 7 agents + mesh via .safety-quotient.dev URLs.
scripts_fleet.scripts/fix-stale-signals.sh: Clears stale escalation/halt files. One-time fleet maintenance.

dashboard_assets.interagent/public/index.html: 1700+ lines. LCARS frame, sidebar, header, 8 station panes, all panels.
dashboard_assets.interagent/public/css/inline-legacy.css: 4300+ lines. V23.01 Okuda palette, trekcolors 2369, 3-state panels, alerts, mobile responsive.
dashboard_assets.interagent/public/css/components.css: 3000+ lines. Data grid, topology, trust matrix, alpha matrix, agent cards.
dashboard_assets.interagent/public/js/core.js: 1100+ lines. Utilities, waveforms, agent selector, number grid, delta tracking, alert system.
dashboard_assets.interagent/public/js/chrome.js: Tab switching, theme, subsystem selector, agent cards, mesh control.
dashboard_assets.interagent/public/js/data-fetch.js: Pulse + status fetch, agentData enrichment, refreshActiveStation.

external_dependencies.zulip: kashifshah.net Zulip — bot credentials in .dev.vars. CF challenge blocks API calls currently. Fix: CF page rule exempting /api/* from JS challenge.
external_dependencies.cloudflare_kv: KV namespace for self-observation. Requires account ID + namespace ID + API token.
external_dependencies.cloudflare_tunnel: Two tunnels — chromabook (psq-agent config) + gray-box. Routes *.safety-quotient.dev + *.unratified.org to local meshd ports.
external_dependencies.github: GITHUB_TOKEN for PR creation via gh CLI. Webhook secret for push event verification.
external_dependencies.sqlite3: Runtime dependency — shells out to sqlite3 binary (no CGO). Must be on PATH.
external_dependencies.claude: deliberate.sh resolves claude binary. Installed via npm (nvm on chromabook, homebrew on gray-box).
